title: conyza bonariensis var. angustifolia
intro: Conyza bonariensis var. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved fleabane, is a variety of the Conyza bonariensis plant, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Conyza bonariensis var. angustifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a potential remedy for infections and wounds. Conyza bonariensis var. angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
